meetings.title: Example — Project kickoff: background & specific aims
meetings.summary: Sample meeting to demonstrate the site. Introduced the motivating literature, framed the central question, and proposed three specific aims for the project.

meetings.title: Example — Optimization progress & troubleshooting
meetings.summary: Sample meeting to demonstrate the site. Walked through optimization attempts, what failed, what improved yields, and the plan for the next quarter.

meetings.title: Example — First results from the second project thread
meetings.summary: Sample meeting to demonstrate the site. A second project thread appears in its own color, showing how parallel work reads as distinct strands on the timeline.
